$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C34a 2026-07-21): the RUN witness for the REAL Tcl_Obj field layout + Option C (D-FFI-DESCRIPTOR-TYPEDEF-NAME-RESOLUTION). Builds a real Tcl_Obj via Tcl_NewIntObj(42), Tcl_IncrRefCounts it, then reads obj->refCount (@0, must be 1), obj->typePtr (@24, non-NULL for a typed int obj) and obj->typePtr->name (the 2-level access = the exact sqlite src/test1.c:6182-6183 S000D that C34a clears) — every one of which was S000D on the pre-C34a opaque arr<u64,6> Tcl_Obj blob. Returns Tcl_GetIntFromObj's readback (42). elf-x86_64 only (libtcl8.6); ubuntu x86_64 CI legs run it, native-arm64 arch-gates, win/macos compile-only. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert tcl.json's Tcl_Obj typedef body to arr<u64,6> -> every obj-> field read fails S000D and this example stops compiling.
